CustomField.description: Semicolon-delimited list of GIS-flagged extraordinary circumstances present at the project site (e.g., ESA Critical Habitat; Wetlands; Tribal Lands; Floodplain). Any value disqualifies CE and downgrades to EA per CEQ regulations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: GIS-flagged extraordinary circumstances (e.g., ESA Critical Habitat; Wetlands). Any flag disqualifies CE.
CustomField.label: Extraordinary Circumstances
